natural_language_question: What was the total Admin Fee (dormancy/inactivity fee) revenue on 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(f.Amount), 0) AS total_dormant_fee_usd
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions f
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
  ON snap.RealCID = f.RealCID
  AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
  AND f.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE f.DateID = 20260608
  AND f.Metric = 'DormantFee'
